title: Fix HSTS max-age=0 left in production
prompt:
The router below has HSTS disabled because someone set `max-age=0` for local testing and forgot to revert:

```elixir
plug :put_secure_browser_headers, %{
  "content-security-policy" => "default-src 'self'",
  "strict-transport-security" => "max-age=0"
}
```

Rewrite the HSTS value to at least `max-age=31536000` (1 year) with `includeSubDomains`. Do not add `preload` (that has significant operational risk). Write the fix to `lib/my_app_web/router.ex`.
tier_rationale: Medium — subtle config bug; requires knowing what a safe HSTS baseline looks like.
